metadata.description: Sky's custom skills collection for Claude Code

plugins.name: linux-kernel-dev

plugins.name: wechat-video-publisher
plugins.description: WeChat article & video production pipeline - edge-tts narration, Playwright frame-by-frame recording, ffmpeg subtitle burning, WeChat inline-style HTML templates

plugins.name: md-to-pdf
plugins.description: Markdown to PDF with Chinese support, bookmarks, and page numbers - uses PyMuPDF Story HTML rendering with DroidSansFallbackFull font
